calendar.matters:
HEARING ON PETITIONER FAROOZ ALLEM'S PETION FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-15-2023 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for Change of Name of Farooq Aleem.

Dept. 505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K.Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:22:38 a.m. and concluding at 10:26:01 a.m.(D505)

Petitioner Farooq Aleem not appearing.
Shanae Washington, Power of Attorney for Petitioner Farooq Aleem, was placed under oath and testified.

Petition for Name Change filed July 10, 2023.
Order to Show Cause set for August 22, 2023.
Proof of Publication filed August 14, 2023.
Notice of Hearing on Petition for Change of Name filed October 26, 2023.

The Court addresses and examines Petitioner's Power of Attorney.

The Court finds that in accordance with California Civil Code of Procedure 1279.5(e); Petitioner's request for change of name is DENIED and the petition is DISMISSED with prejudice. See scanned order.
